utility_evaluation.REASONING: Required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final plan includes all 5 items by name. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details: - health_coverage: requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan lists provider and monthly_cost (100) and features, but does not explicitly state mental health coverage; however the format asks for 'physical and mental health insurance with costs'—the cost is present, but explicit mental health inclusion is not confirmed. Partially specified. - property_coverage: requires home/contents insurance with costs. Plan provides Professional Equipment Insurance details (type, limit, scope, protections) but no costs, and it’s not home/contents insurance per se. Not fully specified. - travel_coverage: requires travel insurance with costs. Plan provides provider, monthly_cost (50), and features. Fully specified. - additional_services: requires any enhancement services with costs. Plan provides premium_membership with monthly_cost (20) and features. Fully specified. - total_budget: requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Plan provides monthly_total (170) and annual_total (2040) and compliance note. Fully specified. Therefore, 3 of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes: LifeFirst Standard Plan (health), a generic Professional Equipment Insurance (no direct match in ratings), InsurePlus Standard Travel Plan (travel), and Premium Insurance Membership at €20/month. From the ground-truth ratings: LifeFirst Standard Plan appears under primary_health.physical_health with rating 9. InsurePlus Standard Plan (travel insurance) has rating 10 under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance. Premium membership corresponds to General Services -> Premium Insurance Membership with rating 6. The Professional Equipment Insurance is not listed among rated property_protection options, so it cannot be mapped.
